title: Product Discovery Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Product Discovery skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

problem_opportunity_statement.description: Problem opportunity statement or initial product hypothesis to investigate

definition_target_user.description: Definition of the target user segment including criteria for participant recruitment

access_users_interviews.description: Access to users for interviews, usability sessions, or prototype testing

existing_behavioral_data.description: Existing behavioral data, analytics, or prior research available for secondary analysis

support_ticket_customer.description: Support ticket or customer complaint logs to surface recurring pain points before primary research

competitor_analogous_product.description: Competitor or analogous product examples to anchor solution hypothesis generation
